title: [InferWidths] firtool crashes on ICache.fir in firrtl regress suite
body:
```
$ firtool -verilog ICache.fir 
ICache.fir:85:14: error: 'firrtl.mux' op LowerToHW couldn't handle this operation
      _T_287 <= _T_282
             ^
ICache.fir:85:14: note: see current operation: %360 = "firrtl.mux"(%357, %353, %66) : (!firrtl.uint<1>, !firrtl.uint<6>, !firrtl.uint) -> !firrtl.uint
ICache.fir:85:14: error: 'firrtl.connect' op LowerToHW couldn't handle this operation
      _T_287 <= _T_282
             ^
ICache.fir:85:14: note: see current operation: "firrtl.connect"(%359, %360) : (!firrtl.uint<6>, !firrtl.uint) -> ()
ICache.fir:324:14: error: 'firrtl.mux' op LowerToHW couldn't handle this operation
      _T_562 <= _T_557
             ^
...
ICache.fir:402:14: note: see current operation: "firrtl.connect"(%748, %749) : (!firrtl.uint<9>, !firrtl.uint) -> ()
Assertion failed: (entry != nameTable.end() && "value expected a name but doesn't have one"), function getName, file ExportVerilog.cpp, line 480.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://bugs.llvm.org/ and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump without symbol names (ensure you have llvm-symbolizer in your PATH or set the environment var `LLVM_SYMBOLIZER_PATH` to point to it):
0  firtool                  0x000000010a8c06a7 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) + 39
1  firtool                  0x000000010a8bf4c8 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() + 248
2  firtool                  0x000000010a8c0cf0 SignalHandler(int) + 288
3  libsystem_platform.dylib 0x00007fff2049ad7d _sigtramp + 29
4  libsystem_platform.dylib 0x000070000733a348 _sigtramp + 18446726485397599720
5  libsystem_c.dylib        0x00007fff203aa406 abort + 125
6  libsystem_c.dylib        0x00007fff203a97d8 err + 0
7  firtool                  0x000000010acb2bd3 (anonymous namespace)::ModuleNameManager::getName(llvm::PointerUnion<mlir::Value, mlir::Operation*>) (.cold.1) +
```
